title: final_decision_signal
description: Node trace output of FinalDecisionController. A lightweight status signal recorded in the trace, distinct from the full final_output artifact delivered to the user.

status.description: The terminal state decided by FinalDecisionController.

diagnosis.description: Present when status is 'blocked'. Names the specific rule or missing field.

x-hard_rules: This is a node trace record, not the user-facing final_output — it does not include cleaned_prompt, diff, or structured_prompt
The full user-facing artifact is produced by OutputBuilder and conforms to final_output.schema.json
diagnosis is required when status is 'blocked' — omitting it is a contract violation
escalated takes precedence over blocked when escalation_signal is present
